decision.reason: Direct post from Jeff Dean's X source announcing Gemini Robotics On-Device work with Google DeepMind/Research/AI; product-specific and AI-relevant.

raw.title: Building on more than 10 years of robotics research and engineering at @GoogleDeepMind, @GoogleResearch and @GoogleAI, we're delighted to announce our Gemini Robotics On-Device system. A really capable vision-language-action model that can  run entirely without network access. ⬇️
